summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 22 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 93 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 31 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 27 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 5 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 22. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 13 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 10 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Ginger Brown:** 9 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 7. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 7. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 6 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 6. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Jeff:** Carrying 30 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Milagros Porturas:** Carrying 13 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

186 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **84 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 60 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 40 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is carrying 20 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 22 overdue — oldest first. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 7 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue — oldest first. 1 upcoming unassigned. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 30. This needs to turn around today.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 20 overdue (oldest: 13d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 6 overdue — oldest first. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 13. This needs to turn around today.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 10 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Ginger Brown:** 9 overdue — oldest first. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 7 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 10 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
